title: Voxel Shape Document
description: A behavior pack voxel shape document for Minecraft Bedrock Edition. This describes the complete JSON file structure including format_version and the minecraft:voxel_shape wrapper.

format_version.title: Format Version
format_version.description: The format version of this voxel shape file. Currently 1.21.110.

minecraft:voxel_shape.title: Voxel Shape Definition
minecraft:voxel_shape.description:
The voxel shape definition container with description and shape data.

Properties:
• description (object)
• shape (object)

defaultSnippets.label: Voxel Shapes VoxelShapeFile
defaultSnippets.description: Defines a complete voxel shape file.
